subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of Grandeur testifieth that there is no God but Him, and He Who is established upon the Throne is verily the Lord of Creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد لسان العظمه انه لا اله الا هو و الذی استقر علی العرش انه لمالک المبدء
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
